name: fieldsite
description: Fieldsite — AI website builder (prompt → SitePlan → assets → deterministic Composer → published static site)

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w workers && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,workers,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w workers" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w workers && npm run typecheck -w frontend
